pages.text: Place the altar at the center, one offering table on each horizontal side, and a 5x5 Celestial Stone outer ring. To make a tier 2 altar, keep the tier 1 ring intact and add Celestial Glass above the four outer corners. Chora Nectar requires tier 2.

Tier 1 requires the frame at the altar's height to remain complete. Celestial Stone, slabs, stairs, and walls all count as frame blocks. Tier 2 only adds Celestial Glass above the four outer corners; the glass does not replace the frame below.

Celestial Glass is made through a tier 1 offering: place a charged Eulogia Crystal on the altar, then place 64 #forge:glass and 64 Glowstone Dust on two offering tables. Duration is 160 ticks and the result is 8 Celestial Glass.
